text: Action: Bow this stronghold - look at the top X cards of you conflict deck, where X is the number of characters an opponent controls with no fate on them. Add 1 of those cards to your hand and put the rest on the bottom of your conflict deck in a random order.
name: Shiro Gisu

text: While your stronghold is Golden Plains Outpost, each character you control gains the Cavalry trait. Reaction: After an attack is declared against this province, choose another eligible province you control - move the conflict to that province.
name: Golden Plains

text: Action: During a conflict at this province, choose a participating character - that character's controller moves 1 fate from their fate pool to the chosen character.
name: Lord's Ascendancy

text: Dire - you may trigger the ability on each holding you control an additional time each round (or specified period). (This character is dire when it has no fate on it.) Each holding you control gets +2 bonus strength.
name: Midnight Builder

text: During a conflict, sacrifice a character - the attacked province gets -2 strength until the end of the conflict (-5 strength instead if the sacrificed character had 1 or more fate on it).
name: Doom Thrower

text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict - each player discards cards from their hand until they have 4 or fewer cards in hand.
flavorText: "We may be outnumbered, but we will never be outmatched."
name: Daidoji Iron Warrior

text: Keeper role only. Covert. Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, if this character is ordinary - switch each participating character's base [conflict-military] skill with its base [conflict-political] skill until the end of the conflict.
name: Furtive Sympathizer

text: Reaction: After 1 or more fate is placed on a character you control by a card effect - draw 1 card (draw 2 cards instead if that character is ordinary).
name: Adorned Temple

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, lose 2 honor - switch the conflict type (The conflict retains its element).
flavorText: "Our service to the throne has never wavered."
name: Ikoma Ujiaki

text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict - your opponent reveals X cards in their hand, where X is the number of characters they control with no fate on them. Choose and discard 1 of the revealed cards.
name: Inquisitorial Initiate

text: Seeker role only. Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose a participating character your opponent controls. They must select one - either remove 1 fate from that character or bow it.
name: Relentless Inquisitor

text: Covert. (When this character attacks, choose one character without covert. That character cannot be declared as a defender.)
flavorText: "Confront only your enemy's weaknesses, never their strengths." - Bayushi's Lies
name: Underhanded Samurai

flavorText: On the distant Plain of Wind and Stone, Shinjo's followers learned new gaijin ways to ride, to hunt and to fight from horseback.
name: Moto Conqueror

text: Limited. Action: Lose 3 honor. Choose a character - place 2 fate on that character.
flavorText: "Kuni did not hesitate when he turned the spirits of Jigoku against Hajimeno Tatakai no Oni. Why should I?" - Kuni Yori
name: At Any Cost

text: Ancestral. (When attached card leaves play, return this card to your hand.) While attached character is honored, it gets +2 glory.
name: Dutiful Assistant

text: Air role only. Restricted. Attached character gains: "Reaction: After this character wins a conflict — draw 2 cards, then discard 1 card from your hand."
name: Setting the Standard

text: Ancestral. Attached character gains: "Action: Discard a status token from this character."
flavorText: "The kie was given to us by Shinsei to finally be free of karma and reincarnation."
name: Belief in the Little Teacher

text: Action: During a [conflict-political] conflict, choose a participating character with printed cost equal to or lower than that of another participating character you control - place 1 fate on the chosen character. If you do, bow it, move it home, and dishonor it.
name: Ujiaki's Offer

text: Limited. Reaction: After you declare a [conflict-military] conflict, if you are more honorable than your opponent, choose an eligible province not currently being attacked - reveal it, if able. The conflict is also at that province.
name: A War on Two Fronts

text: Reaction: After you win a conflict as the attacking player - remove 1 fate from each character your opponent controls. Then, choose a character with no fate on it controlled by that opponent and bow it.
name: Cleanse the Empire

text: Interrupt: When an opponent would draw 1 or more cards outside the draw phase, if you are less honorable than that opponent - discard up to 3 of those cards instead.
name: Subterfuge

text: Action: During a conflict, choose a Cavalry character you control. Select one - either move that character to the conflict or move it home.
flavorText: "Why would we settle down like some indulgent Bayushi, when we draw strength from our unique freedom?" - Moto Rurame
name: Ride On
